title: Infinitee Xclusives - 12 Pack Face Cloths |30x30 cm| 100% Cotton Wash Cloths - Ultra Soft & Highly Absorbent Fingertip Towels for Spa, Gym, Hotel & Bathroom |Brilliant White|
features: BEST VALUE FOR MONEY – This 12-piece bulk Wash cloth Set delivers best value for your money in this product category. These [30x30 cm] face cloths are suited for all kinds of cleaning jobs weather at home, hotel, spa, saloon, bar or office.

PREMIUM QUALITY - Infinitee Xclusives Washcloths set of 12 is not only durable; it is also an extra absorbent. The finest genuine cotton remains fresh and soft after multiple washes of these cleaning towels. These are the perfect and ideal gym towels to absorb sweat after long hours of training in the gym.

DURABLE AND WASHABLE – Made from 100% Ring Spun Cotton, these washcloth are double stitched which makes them highly durable as they retain their shape even after multiple washes. They are stitched to perfection with no loose strands and are machine washable.

MULTIPURPOSE TOWELS - The Infinitee Xclusives [12 Pack] of fingertip towels are very popular for a variety of uses. These washcloths can be used as cleaning rags, shop rags for cleaning windows, glass doors, mirrors leaving no streaks or stains.
EASY CARE - Wash cloth are machine washable and tumble dry on low heat to keep things easy. Before using these terry cotton face towels for the first time, it is advised that you wash them.
